description: Create a technical AV signal flow schematic for a standard Zoom Room based on the Scope of Work in '~/Desktop/av_scope_of_work.txt'. The schematic must include all equipment (Microphone, DSP, Switch, PC, Camera, Display, Speakers) and show physical connections using correct transport protocols. Use specific line styles: Blue Solid (2pt) for Network/Dante, Black Thick (4pt) for HDMI/Video, Grey Dashed for USB, and Green Solid for Analog Audio. Save the editable diagram to '~/Diagrams/av_schematic.drawio' and export a PDF to '~/Diagrams/av_schematic.pdf'.
